listing_name: ANTUEN L.L.-THE BEST VIEWS IN PUCON
description:
The space
ANTUEN COTTAGES
Antuen Cottages invites you to enjoy the exceptional landscapes that the rural region of Pucón has to offer, just 6km from downtown. The cabins are located at a park with spectacular views of the Villarrica lake and Volcano. The owners, experts on the region, will advise you about how to enjoy the natural beauty of its surroundings (rivers, lakes, waterfalls and native woods) as well as the broad variety of mountain activities: trekking, cycling, rafting, fishing, golf, and thermal baths, among others.
You can get here by car or if you don't have a car we can pick you up at the bus terminal in Pucon. The cabin offers the comfort and tranquillity to enjoy relaxing holidays. We have the best views of the lake and the volcano as well as the careful attention of Clara and Ernesto - hosts - able to provide as much information about this beautiful region as you desire. The cottage has two bedrooms, one bathrooms with bath, open kitchen and a spacious living room with windows overlooking the lake and the volcano Villarrica. It is inserted in a large park of one hectare for the exclusive use of guests. It is fully equipped (stove, refrigerator, microwave, kettel etc.).Also enjoy the deck and gardens with wonderful views of the lake and volcano, the ideal place to enjoy a barbecue or to share a drink with friends. If you want to go for lunch or dinner Pucón, (only 6 km.) offers a variety of restaurants with excellent cuisine. During your stay Clara and Ernesto, will personally attend you with advise on the different activities to experience here (hiking, biking and horseback riding, visits to the baths, walks by the lake, golf, tennis, leases multiple, etc) We invite you to visit this beautiful place and enjoy the environment around us.

listing_name: siempreverde: Gorgeous, Spacious Eco Paradise
description:
Enjoy Pucon's charm in our beautiful, quiet, custom, eco-home below Villarrica National Park. This unique find is ideal for adventurous nature, bird, garden, and cooking lovers. We've got a dream kitchen for exploring the local cuisine. Come stay in our comfy, spacious, bright, well-insulated home and live like a local, in a safe and quiet neighborhood. Enjoy the tranquility of mountain life, stars, bird song, and the best drinking water ever. Hike and ski to Villarrica NP from the house!

The space
This is not a usual vacation rental, it was my home for over 9 years. It is a very comfortable and beautiful homestead that we are offering for you to experience. We hope you will appreciate all the details that have made this place so special for so many.
2025 NOTE: We have a new, insulated roof (no more leaks during Andean storms) and an additional wood stove and backup solar power! Which means when everyone else doesn't have power--which is rather often lately in the region--you will likely have both power and internet!
We have fast and reliable Starlink satellite internet. The home office is a great private workspace with a garden view, and there are several other nice options around the house for virtual work.
Our large master bedroom has lovely views from the king-sized bed which opens onto a huge deck with a built-in claw-foot bath. The bed is amazingly comfortable with quality sheets and a down comforter (we do have other options for those who can't do down.) There is also a couch in the master bedroom with a pull-out bed for extra guests or little kids. The bedroom includes a small custom-made desk/workspace, lots of English books, and a wood stove.
The second bedroom has a queen bed with a forest view and morning sun, and its own door to the deck. Both bedrooms have black out curtains for sleeping-in days.
The bathroom was recently remodeled with a spacious tub and shower with a forest view, lovely for sunny morning soaks. If you love baths, you'll love the outdoor tub on the deck in the early morning listening to bird songs, or at night under a star-filled sky with the milky way and perhaps a shooting star.
We've got a dream kitchen to create everything from gourmet meals to simple snacks, with a big gas stove and oven, as well as a wonderful wood cookstove/oven. We've got all the pots and pans and utensils you'll need, and a host of great cookbooks in English and Spanish, as well as many condiments and a variety of spices. There's an herb garden outside to add local flavor to your creations.
There is a smart TV in the kitchen/living area, and a big wood stove between the kitchen and dining area, so in addition to the cocina leña (wood cook stove), you can be very cozy on chilly mountain nights.
The outside is magnificent, with beautiful views and lots of lush, green forests and gardens and flowers and birds in summer, or beautiful snow in the winter. The song birds are fabulous in the morning and evening, and then there are the stars! There is lots of room to run and play, for kids of all ages.
Our organic gardens and greenhouses have lots of raspberries and Concord grapes in early summer, blueberries in summer and fall, and apples and in the fall. There are sometimes extra veggies in the greenhouses or garden for you to enjoy (please check with Nico first). If you’re so inclined, we appreciate your help watering the house greenhouse (or let Rosa know to water).
We have lots of toys for all ages, including board games, a yoga mat, and more. We also have a \tent cabin\" in the woods for a quiet retreat

listing_name: Spacious Riverside Cabin in Native Forest | Pucón
description:
A simple, warm wooden cabin hidden in a native forest, right on the Trancura River. Designed for families and friends who value nature, river sounds, and shared time over luxury.
It is an excellent place to disconnect. Activities you can do in this area: hiking, mountain biking, rafting, kayaking, rock climbing, horseback riding, fly fishing, skiing (winter) and hot springs.
Smoking is NOT allowed in this property inside or outside the cabin

The space
The cabin is a one floor place with an open kitchen to the dinning and living room area.Main room is in suit on one side and kids rooms are on the opposite side. We are 15 kms from Pucon where you can find all you need from food to climbing gear.

The native forest, the birds and the river are the sounds that surround this place. Disconnection from the digital world gives you time. Time to be and connect with what really matters. There are different spaces to relax, hammocks, beach next to the river, terrace in height (children must be accompanied by an adult).

Guest access
You have a river right in front of the property where you can swim, raft , fly fish or simply contemplate by the fire.

Other things to note
Some areas of the forest are under restoration. Pine trees are being removed so native trees can grow freely. Fenced areas protect young seedlings — please respect them as they are the future forest.
Also, we have a compost that I recommend and expect you to use so you have less garbage to deal with. Garbage track pass Tuesdays, Thursdays and Saturdays . Please don’t put in the compost bones, meat, fat, and lemons or any acid foods. Cover with leaves after you throw food in.Thanks!

listing_name: Exclusive apartment in a privileged sector
description:

You'll love my place, as it's located in an exclusive, safe condominium, surrounded by nature, with a private descent to the lake, with a grass and sand beach that has piers, and a beach café. My accommodation is good for couples, adventurers and families (with children).

The space
The apartment has a large 20 m2 terrace overlooking the forest and park. It is equipped with a living room, table for 8 people and a gas barbecue. It is fully equipped with native wood furniture made by well-known local artisans and comfortable spaces that will make you enjoy your stay.

From the living-dining room or the kitchenette you can enjoy the view of the forest.

On the beach there is an area for swimming and 2 piers with a jetty for water sports next to a boat ramp for which there is a special tractor and boat for subsequent transfer to resident buoys, these can be used according to current availability.

It has security guards and automatic controlled access 24 hours a day to provide security and the utmost privacy for your rest.

listing_name: Live the southern experience.
description:
Modern cabin in a natural environment, five thousand m2 of grass, a stream, 2 large willows with pleasant shade, and a small forest of coihues and oaks. The house has a living-dining room and integrated kitchen, 2 bedrooms, each with a private bathroom, slow-burning stove, panoramic windows.
Located at Km 13 of the Villarrica Pucón road, 500 meters from it, very close to the main attractions of the area.

The space
The house was built in 2015, in a modern and minimalist style. Its interior appearance is in bleached wood, with very simple and cozy decoration.
It is a thermal construction based on wood and SIP Isothermal panels, it has thermo panel glass windows and a slow-burning wood stove. The rooms are bright with large windows and the bedrooms have blackout curtains.
The kitchen is equipped with a refrigerator, a glass-ceramic stove, a washing machine, a microwave and electric ovens, a blender, and a kettle. Barbecue grill and terrace.
The bedrooms are furnished so that the beds can be used as double or single beds, they have a chest of drawers with 6 large drawers and a coat rack.
The bathrooms (one with tub and one with shower) are separated in the washbasin area (semi integrated into the bedroom) and shower and toilet area.
A stream runs in front of the house.

Other things to note
As this is our vacation home, we only ask that you also feel it as your own, that you take care of it and try to leave it as similar as possible to how you received it (order and washing dishes).
While there is wifi, it is limited. It works for emails and calls and WhatsApp, but not for watching movies or very long meetings

listing_name: Spacious Holiday Home for Summer Sun or Winter Ski
description:
Nestled within the native woodlands of Volcan Villarica, this exclusive property offers perfect seclusion and privacy for a relaxing family holiday with beautiful panoramic views, including that of the volcano. This unique holiday home features all the comforts you'll need for the duration of your stay. Located off the main road 'camino al volcan' Green Zone with easy access to Ski Pucón, just minutes away from Lake Villarica and Pucon Center, Araucania awaits you.

The space
Key features: Fireplace, Under Floor Heating, Tapped Mineral Water, 3 Bedrooms (Walk in Closet/Closets), 1 Office Space/Spare Bedroom, 2 Main Bathrooms + Guest, Whirlpool Tub, Laundry Room + Washer/Dryer. Traditional (Spring Water) Wood Burner Hot Tub with Covered BBQ Area. Private Parking, CCTV Security Cameras*, Free Wi-Fi, LED TV + Playstation, Audio System. No noise or light pollution for photo/videography & audio.

Guest access
All Areas

Other things to note
A LIVE VOLCANO

The land is certified to be in the Green Zone by the Municipality of Pucon before we were allowed to build our home.

A POOL?

People ask 'why no swimming pool?' We have a young son, so for now it is on hold.

However, we do have an excellent traditional Hot & Cold tub. Wood fired, it's piping hot for late night lounges or early morning starts. During peak summer you can use for the exact opposite. The water will be equally, as a friend put it; 'liquid ice'.

*Also it is important to note that we have 24/7 CCTV Security Cameras - NO HIDDEN CAMERAS / NO AUDIO.

For more information please feel free to ask.

Please read manual for details.

listing_name: Comfortable villa surrounded by native forest with a pond
description:

listing_name: BEACH, pool, tinaja, pool, VIEW, fireplace
description:
Beautiful house located in the rural sector of Pucón, with a fully equipped BEACH for 10 people, with air conditioning/heating, and a slow combustion stove, lake and volcano view, pool, swimming pool and optional jar (You can use it whenever you want for free but it does not include firewood, lighting, or fire maintenance) It has 4 TVs with ROKU system, SATELLITE internet
Located 12 km from downtown, of which 6 km are gravel, and 300 meters from the beach.
Enjoy Pucon from the tranquility

The space
First of all, keep in mind that you have to go down a small staircase to access the space, so it is not convenient for wheelchairs or people with walking difficulties.

The house has 3 levels, a bedroom on the ground floor where there are 2 cabins, one in the middle with a 2-seater bed and another on the top floor with a 2-seater bed and a 1-seater with a trundle bed, in addition to the living room there is a 2-seater sofa bed.

It has a split air conditioning and heating of 18,000 btu in the living room area, electric stoves in the bedrooms and a slow combustion in the pool area, fans in each bedroom and windows with mosquito netting.

It has a dishwasher, washing machine, dining room for up to 10 people, 50-inch Smart TV in the living room with Zapping application where you can access more than 30 channels, Netflix, YouTube by accessing with your personal account.
All bedrooms have TVs. There is also a bluetooth speaker, a 60-square-meter panoramic terrace overlooking the lake and volcano, with a covered living room and outdoor dining room (Consider that the terrace is high up, it has a metal safety net for children on the railing).

It's an ideal place to rest, surrounded by nature, away from the noise and cars of Pucón.

The pool season begins on December 1 and runs until March 15.

The condo has a beach that you can access on foot or by 4×4 vehicle only in summer (Parking only for 1 car on the shore of the lake). You have to cross a small river by car, on foot there is a suspension bridge.

You can use the tinaja at no additional cost but you must buy the firewood you are going to use (You can buy it in the center or you can buy it from me at $6,000 per bag). It is delivered with the water changed. There is a caretaker who helps you start the fire for a price to be agreed directly with him, but then you must keep the fire going for about 4 to 5 hours until you get the desired temperature. I do not have a person to do this job, I only offer the tinaja, you must keep a strong fire going permanently, that depends on you being able to heat the water well, I can teach you, but it is your responsibility to get good results.
As HEATING in the bedrooms, all beds have bed warmers.

*THE FIREWOOD THAT IS IN SIGHT IS ONLY FOR MY PERSONAL USE.
There is a trekking place with a path to the ravine on the same plot where you can enjoy the native forest in all its dimension.
In case of a power outage, you have a fully charged generator. You have to prorate this charge for the hours of most light demand. If you need more gasoline, you have to pay for it yourself. I only give you the full generator.

Guest access
You have parking inside the property for 2 cars (If you come in more vehicles, they must be left at the caretaker's house at the entrance of the condominium) also on the beach for 1 vehicle.
Please park straight as this parking lot is for 3 cars (one space is for the small cabin).
If you are going to use the tinaja during your stay, let me know in advance to deliver it to you clean and with fresh water. If you want, you can pay Carlitos (the condominium caretaker) to START the fire for you for an agreed-upon price. You have to keep the fire going strong for about 3 hours in summer and 5 in winter. The price of a bag of firewood is $6,000 pesos, and approximately one bag is used per hour. You have to consider that in the middle of winter the temperatures are around 0 degrees and heating the tinaja requires many more hours and much more firewood.

Other things to note
WE ARE IN A VOLCANIC SAFETY ZONE.
If you decide to use the tinaja, you have to consider that the process takes about 6 hours between cleaning and heating. If you need to hire someone to start the fire, it has to be a day in advance since the people who can help you have other jobs. Ideally, you should try to do it yourself, I can teach you, it's just like starting a barbecue fire, only you have to put the sticks upright and always start with chips, cardboard and a little paraffin.

listing_name: Beautiful chalet and surroundings in the south of Chile: Pucón
description:
Unique house on a 5,000 m2 plot, completely available to guests.
Spacious, exclusive and maximum comfort for 10 people: 5 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, 9 beds (1 double).
The house: spacious living room with slow-burning stove and 2 terraces. New, modern and comfortable equipment.
The surroundings: steps from the Ojos del Caburgua and other natural attractions, minutes from Huerquehue National Park, Caburgua Lake, Licura and Trancura rivers, hot springs to choose from.

The space
In addition to the capacity of beds for 10 people in the bedrooms, there is a sofa bed in the living room that can comfortably sleep 2 more people.

Guest access
Guests have access to the entire plot in addition to the house, completely for them.

Other things to note
The environment is incomparable for lovers of trekking and different types of contact with nature (bicycles, horseback riding, river descents, visits to waterfalls, lakes, hot springs, national park, etc.), which can be enjoyed without much effort and with the comfort of having a comfortable space for a restful rest.
All this just over 15 kilometers from downtown Pucón, and less than 10 from the beaches of Caburgua.

listing_name: Comfortable house 4 km from Pucón
description:
Comfortable and spacious wooden house in condominium 4 km from Pucón.Hermosa lake view, although the trees have grown. The house is not on the shore of the lake.
House is ideal for families with small children,there is Grrilla for barbecue on the terrace and a cozy stove near the terrace.
La Piscina is 150 mt from the house(summer),beach 300 mt from the house,crossing the road,to bathe in summer and take nice photos in the sunsets in autumn-winter.

The space
The house is very cozy and comfortable for 8 people, it is approximately 180 m2, it has a nice view from the terrace to Lake Villarrica, although the trees have grown, and pleasant barbecues are prepared. 5 meters from the terrace there is a very comfortable fire pit.
The central heating works with a wood-burning boiler, which must be lit when it is cold and must be fed with wood approximately every two hours. More details will be explained upon arrival.
There are 4 bedrooms on the first floor, a master bedroom suite, a second master bedroom, both with a king-size bed, a third bedroom with a trundle bed, and the fourth with 2 beds. There are 2 TVs with Directv, one in the living room and the other in the master bedroom suite. For colder days, there is a gas stove in the living room.

Guest access
The house is located inside a condominium where there is a complex of family cabins. The swimming pools for adults and children (the pools can be used from December to March), children's games, a zip line and a ping-pong table are located 150 meters from the house, in the cabins sector. To access the beach, it is 300 meters from the house. You can walk down or drive (there is parking) and you have to cross the road.

Other things to note
The house has sheets and bath towels (one per person of 50x70), and there is a hand towel in each bathroom. You only need to bring a towel for the beach and/or hot springs. If your stay is 2 weeks, a set of spare sheets is left in the closet. Once the sheets are changed, they are removed for washing.
There are also kitchen towels and tablecloths for the tables (dining room and terrace), 2 napkin rings with napkins and 1 Nova towel. I'll leave coffee, tea, and sugar for your arrival. There is also salt and some condiments and some toiletries, such as dishwashing soap and bleach gel, as well as a new sponge and yellow cloth.

listing_name: Private Shelter, National Park, Lake, Kayak & Hot Tub
description:
Loft-style, independent refuge, shores of Lake Tinquilco. Part of it is Huerquehue National Park. Surrounded by a private park. Capacity: 3 people, panoramic terrace, lake access, hot tub, central heating and pure natural spring water. Equipped kitchen, covered grill and bathroom with English bathtub. Kayak with Faldon to explore crystal clear waters and white sandy beaches. Private dock. Croquet court facing the lake. Our camp inside the Park allows hiking and forest bathing included.

The space
Enjoy cozy and well put on the shores of Lake Tinquilco (part of this lake is the national park) and 700 meters. entrance National Park Huerquehue.

Loft-style refuge, with 6,000 m2 of well-kept parks, tranquility and maximum privacy. Capacity for 3 people, panoramic terrace with beautiful lake view, hot tub (value: cost of the cost/ Powered by natural spring water that springs from our property) and private access to the lake.

Kayak's with skirts (no cost): to explore the crystal clear waters of the lake and white sand beaches. Own dock to embark, throw in the towel next to the lake and/or bathe in its crystal clear waters.

The shelter has central oil heating (at no extra cost). In winter, the temperature is low and our visitors must have adequate clothing. It also has a bay window bed with a very nice view.
The bathroom has a classic English bathtub overlooking the native vegetation. The shower is a hand-held type and is not fixed to the wall, in order to preserve the fine native Leuque woods that line this space.

We have a covered barbecue grill to eat delicious roasts in a lovely place, next to large cacti

Private parking without a roof for our visitors.

Croquet court overlooking the lake, classic game of Irish and English origin, founded in 1850.
It is played by hitting balls with clubs through arches on the lawn, it is easy to learn, slow and elegant, ideal for quiet evenings as a couple and contemplation of living nature.

The refuge offers hiking to the waterfalls inside our field in the National Park (no cost/brochure made by Conaf of the forest baths is delivered).

An ideal setting to walk calmly, experience nature and reconnect in a protected landscape of high ecological value.

Guest access
We are ready to welcome you!

Other things to note
Minimum stay: 2 nights.

listing_name: Tinquilco Cabin, N. Huerquehue Park, Onderdak
description:
Mountain Retreat!
The setting is charming because it is at the foot of one of the most beautiful parks in the country. Special for ecotourism and trekking, but it is also ideal for rest, spiritual retreat, intellectual retreat, or honeymoon. 50 minutes from Pucón, 1/2 hour from Termas and Lake Caburgua, 10 minutes walk from Lake Tinquilco beach and Park trails. Accommodation for couples, adventurers, and families with 1 child.

The space
It is a stunning, peaceful mountain landscape, surrounded by native forest, lakes, waterfalls and estuaries. The National Park unfolds its trails to experience it in depth. The Los Lagos trail, the Quinchol trail to San Sebastián Hill. The Ñirrico trail is the shortest (0.5 hrs), and if you continue beyond the Los Lagos trail, you reach the Termas de Río Blanco, the longest (8 hrs), and also the most beautiful...

Guest access
It is not easy to find a peaceful cabin almost inside a National Park, which in addition to the services associated with the ecotourism of the Park, has a lake and beach at the same time. On the website you can learn about the Park's attractions and services. Lake Tinquilco's beach is a 10-minute walk from the cabin. It's small but not many people go there and it has private areas.
The cabin is fully equipped for cooking and eating at home, but if you want to eat out, there is a pleasant hostel 200 meters away where you can eat. There is also a kiosk 150 meters away, \La Pulguita\" with some groceries and food.

Other things to note
From December to April

listing_name: Pucón Country house with pool 5 km from downtown
description:
House intended for families, fully equipped for 8 people, located on a 5000 m plot in a beautiful and quiet condominium, just 5 km from Pucón. Large dining room, living room with fireplace, kitchen with dining room, 4 bedrooms, 5 beds, 3 double beds, three full bathrooms, slow combustion, terrace, barbecue grill and swimming pool.
For those who love contact with nature, they will be able to hike, sport fishing, visit Lake Caburgua , Termas, Ojos del Caburgua.

The space
It's a quiet place, ideal for relaxing. You can enjoy a large garden, the view of beautiful hills and native trees.
It's a cozy house.

Guest access
We live on the same plot, in a separate house nearby, so we can be available if you need us. We have 1 small, very friendly dog. Inside the house, there is only one step between the dining room and the living room.

Other things to note
We assist you with the use of the fireplace, which is only for winter season.
Bath towels are not included. If you need them, request them in advance (they have an additional cost of $5000 per unit)
We assist you with the use of the combustion stove, on days of low temperatures.
If you only speak English or Aleman, we can help you.
If you want to go fishing, trekking or horseback riding in the area, we can organize it for you.

The house has parking for two vehicles, three spacious bedrooms, and a master bedroom with a private bathroom. Enjoy a one-of-a-kind experience in Pucón! Book now and enjoy your well-deserved vacation

The space
Our home is strategically located next to the main road, a few steps from downtown, in a serene and peaceful environment. You will enjoy ample space to park your vehicle inside, as well as a charming backyard adorned with beautiful flowers and a couple of comfortable lounge chairs for your total relaxation. In addition, we have a charming side garden that makes this place a cozy and extremely quiet oasis. You'll feel right at home from the moment you arrive!

Other things to note
Our home is located in a sector where all my neighbors are family, so we all know each other, which makes it a safe space.

description:
The House is located in the Parque Pinares Condominium, located in Pucón, in the La Araucanía region.
700 meters (15 minutes walk) from downtown Pucón and 11 km from the ski resort.
There is free private parking for two cars on the premises.

The house has a magnificent grill in the private garden, a ping pong table and some board games to enjoy your stay, along with a cable TV and free WIFI.

Best of all: the condominium's private beach on Lake Villarrica!

The space
The house has 3 bedrooms on 2nd floor (there is staircase)
In the main bedroom you will have the pleasure of sleeping in a comfortable King bed in a very spacious piece.
It has 3 bathrooms, 2 in the 2nd floor and 1 in the first floor.

The kitchen is equipped with everything you need for a perfect stay: oven, microwave, kettle and toaster.
They will be able to occupy a washing machine and iron for your clothes.
In short, it has clean towels and sheets for each guest.

Guest access
The condominium has a large swimming pool (with sun loungers), gym, barbecue, tables and living room.
It also has private access to La Poza beach on Lake Villarica with its beautiful view of the entire city.

Other things to note
The house is very family-friendly and comfortable. Among its highlights are its proximity to the city of Pucón and all the nearby activities.
